summary: First end-to-end test run for Facets Jewellery CRM MVP. Backend: 26/26 pytest cases pass against the public ingress URL covering auth, role enforcement, leads CRUD with pagination/filters, activities, tasks, calls, WhatsApp threads/send, products with role checks, appointments, quotations (auto QT- number), AI logs, notifications, users, dashboard stats. Frontend (Playwright): admin login -> dashboard with 6 stat tiles + pie + bar charts rendered (₹14,52,34,519 pipeline, 100 leads, etc.), all 8 sidebar nav items route correctly, leads pagination + lead detail page + add-note flow works, tasks/calls/whatsapp/products/users pages render, WhatsApp shows 20 seeded conversations and Send works, Products catalogue renders INR ₹ pricing and Add Product dialog opens, mobile (390x844) topbar menu toggle opens sidebar, logout redirects to /login, clearing localStorage and hitting protected route redirects to /login. PWA assets (/manifest.json, /service-worker.js, /offline.html) all return 200.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs repeated width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on initial render before container measures - cosmetic console noise only, charts ultimately render correctly. Consider giving the chart wrapper a fixed minHeight/aspect to suppress warnings.

action_items: Optional: silence Recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height warnings by giving dashboard chart wrappers an explicit minHeight or aspect prop.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend schemas use slightly inconsistent field naming across resources (Products require `product_name`, Appointments require `customer_name`+`appointment_date`, WhatsApp uses `message`, Leads use `name`). Not a bug but consider a doc/README block clarifying create payloads so API consumers don't hit 422.
JWT secret + admin password are committed to /app/backend/.env. Acceptable for MVP but flag for production rotation.
/api/health performs a DB ping inside the request - fine for SQLite, but if migrated to a real DB this can become a per-request load source.
test_credentials: Admin admin@facetscrm.com / password123, Sales aditi.kapoor@facetscrm.com / password123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md, verified working).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Existing seed (100 leads, 50 tasks, 100 calls, 20 WhatsApp convos, 40 products/appointments/quotations/ai logs, 6 users) was used and confirmed by both backend assertions and UI screenshots.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_facets_crm.py (pytest). Run: `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_facets_crm.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. To reset DB use `cd /app/backend && python seed.py`. Frontend localStorage keys are `facets_token`, `facets_refresh`, `facets_user` (axios attaches Bearer from `facets_token`). All sidebar nav data-testids work as documented in the request. Dashboard renders 6 stat tiles with `data-testid=stat-*`.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all features in the request behave as specified.
